title: ocimum odorum
intro: Ocimum odorum, also known as the fragrant basil, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. This plant is native to tropical regions and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Ocimum odorum include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and improved respiratory function. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and essential oils, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
